§6Crystal Growth Accelerator§f:
The §6Crystal Growth Accelerator §f(appliedenergistics2:quartz_growth_accelerator) is a §eprocessing block §f that §bgrows Certus Quartz crystals §f in the world. Place §6Charged Certus Quartz Seeds §f on the accelerator and they will grow over time into §6Certus Quartz Buds §f and eventually into §6Pure Certus Quartz Crystals §f.

§6Production Path (network/blocks/crystal_processing_quartz_growth_accelerator.json)§f:
Pattern "aba / cdc / aba":
- §ba§f: §6Iron Ingot §f(ingotIron) — 4 (corners)
- §bb§f: §6ME Glass Cable - Fluix §f(appliedenergistics2:part:16) — 1 (top middle)
- §cc§f: §6Quartz Glass §f(appliedenergistics2:quartz_glass) — 2 (middle left, middle right)
- §cd§f: §6Fluix Block §f(appliedenergistics2:fluix_block) — 1 (centre)
- Yields 1× Crystal Growth Accelerator

§6Function (BlockQuartzGrowthAccelerator.java)§f:
- §bCrystal growth §f: speeds up the §6natural §fCertus Quartz crystal growth (which is otherwise random)
- §bCharged Certus Quartz §f: the accelerator grows §6charged §f variants when fed §6Charged Certus Quartz Seeds §f
- §bPure Certus Quartz §f: when given §bcertain §fseed combinations, the accelerator can produce §6Pure Certus Quartz §f (used in §6Pattern Terminals §f and §6Formation Cores §f)
- §bFluix Dust §f byproduct: growth emits a small amount of §6Fluix Dust §f
- §bPower draw §f: §b1 AE/t §f at idle, scales with crystal tier
- §bMultiblock? No §f: the Crystal Growth Accelerator is a §6single block §f — no 3×3×3 required

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Crystal Growth Accelerator is a component of, but it is referenced in 2,100 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bCertus Quartz farming §f: a §6farm §f of accelerators can produce a steady supply of §6Certus Quartz Crystals §f
- §bPure Certus Quartz §f: needed for §6Formation Cores §f and certain processor upgrades
- §bCharged Certus Quartz §f: needed for §6Annihilation Cores §f and §6Calculation Processors §f

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: feed the accelerator with §6Charged Certus Quartz Seeds §f and §6water §f; a single accelerator can produce 1-2 crystals per minute
- §eTip§f: place an §6Export Bus §f on the §6top face §f to extract grown crystals into the network automatically
- §cWarning§f: the accelerator requires §bredstone power §f to operate; without it, the §bseed §f will not grow
- §cWarning§f: charging §6Certus Quartz §f into §6Charged Certus Quartz §f requires a §6Charger §f (see §6Charger §f quest) — the accelerator does §cnot §f charge
